'''Nyssa''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector's]] [[Nyssa system/Legends|Nyssa system]], in the [[Mecetti Province]]. The [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] cult of [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] known as the [[Mecrosa Order]] arose on the planet thousands of years before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], backed by [[House Mecetti]].

During the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], the Order was styled into a Sith cult of assassins that produced a number of Sith Lords, fighting for [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]].<ref name="TEA" />

The Mecrosa Order was exterminated by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and [[House Pelagia]] during the [[Cleansing of the Nine Houses]], one of the [[Old Sith Wars]]. Under the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], young House Mecetti secretly revived the Order.
